name: claude-kit
description: Claude Code skills + agents for React 19 / Vite SPA work. Three plugins: react-core (portable skills), react-agents (templates + profile-generator), pps-web-profile (Aware reference).

plugins.name: react-core
plugins.description: React 19 / Vite SPA skills: perf, composition, audit, revamp, ux-review, dry. Stack-agnostic across any web-React project.

plugins.name: react-agents
plugins.description: Templates for the build/polish/pre-commit subagent trio + a profile-generator skill that scaffolds a project-specific profile interactively.

plugins.name: pps-web-profile
plugins.description: Aware pps-web project profile: implement/polish/pre-commit/test agents (Thai output) wired to MC-1..MC-7. Adaptive primitive guidance (reads pps-web's own docs/components/ + design-system.md). Depends on react-core + react-agents.
